name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement

---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what makes it hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new tool or option, sketch the inputs/outputs.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related arXiv/MCP features, or anything else useful.
